title: codereview: CMakeLists.txt missing include for dtn header in coap_dtn
description: After adding coap_dtn.c, the include path for lichen/routing/dtn.h may be needed. Also add to coap_server registration if not using COAP_RESOURCE_DEFINE. Check for duplicate symbols or build errors. Tagged codereview per task.
